Who I Am

About Me

I am an M.Sc. Biotechnology student at Lovely Professional University with a CGPA of 8.15, and a strong interest in molecular biology, cell biology, and bioinformatics. My academic training and laboratory experience have equipped me with a solid foundation in experimental design, molecular techniques, and data analysis.

I have extensive hands-on laboratory experience in molecular and genetic engineering techniques, including ELISA, blotting techniques, chromatography, PCR, gel electrophoresis, and DNA & RNA isolation. Currently working in a Genetic Engineering Laboratory, involved in gene cloning, gene editing, and related molecular biology workflows.

Previously, I worked in a Plant Biotechnology Laboratory where I developed understanding of applied plant biotechnology. Alongside wet-lab skills, I have a growing interest in bioinformatics — particularly in the analysis of biological data to support molecular and cellular research.

Lab Experience

Research Experience

🧬

Genetic Engineering Laboratory

Lovely Professional University · Present

Currently involved in gene cloning, gene editing, and related molecular biology workflows. Gaining exposure to modern research methodologies including CRISPR-based genome editing and recombinant DNA techniques.

🌿

Plant Biotechnology Laboratory

Lovely Professional University

Acquired hands-on experience in plant-based molecular experiments and plant tissue culture. Developed understanding of applied plant biotechnology, strengthening analytical thinking and interpretation of experimental data.

🔬

CRISPR-Cas9 Training & Internship

Maulana Azad Medical College (MAMC), New Delhi · 2026

Gained direct exposure to genome editing workflows and CRISPR-Cas mechanisms. Learned gRNA design, gene targeting strategies, and molecular cloning basics through formal training by Edutech Life in association with MAMC.

Research Output

Projects

🧬

Molecular Biomarkers and Genomic Signatures for Early Detection of Diseases

Research · Book Chapter (In Progress)

Currently authoring a book chapter that focuses on the identification and application of molecular biomarkers and genomic signatures for the early detection of diseases. The chapter highlights recent advances in genomics and molecular diagnostics, emphasizing their role in early diagnosis, risk assessment, and precision medicine.

Genomics Molecular Diagnostics Biomarkers Precision Medicine Technical Writing
In Progress
🌊

Mobile Algal Air Purification using Spirulina platensis

Innovation · COGNITIA-2026, LPU Innovation Deck

Designed and presented a sustainable air purification prototype integrating HEPA filtration with live Spirulina platensis cultures. Showcased at LPU's competitive innovation platform COGNITIA-2026 as a cost-effective, bio-based approach to urban air pollution reduction.

Algal Biotech Air Purification Spirulina COGNITIA 2026

3rd National Workshop — FE-SEM & Nano-Structural Imaging

LPU Research & Development Cell · in collaboration with JEOL
26–28 March 2026 · Certificate No. 452330 · Issued: 20-04-2026
Participated in the 3rd National Workshop on Advance Research with Field Emission Scanning Electron Microscopy: Exploring the Nano-Structural Imaging, organized by the Central Instrumentation Facility, Research and Development Cell, at Lovely Professional University, Punjab. Gained hands-on exposure to high-resolution FE-SEM imaging and nano-structural analysis.
📜 Certificate of Participation

CRISPR & Gene Editing — Online Training

Edutech Life × Impressions MAIDS, Maulana Azad Medical College (MAMC)

Successfully completed the online training program on CRISPR & Gene Editing. Introduced fundamental concepts of CRISPR-Cas systems and their applications in genome editing and modern biotechnology research, strengthening understanding of gene modification techniques and their relevance in molecular biology.

Future Direction

Goals & Research Vision

🔬

Research Orientation

To develop a strong research foundation in molecular biology and cell biology, with a focused interest in understanding gene regulation and cellular processes through rigorous experimental research.

🎓

Academic Development

To engage in research-oriented learning during postgraduate studies and gain exposure to advanced scientific methodologies that support independent research thinking and laboratory innovation.

🚀

Long-Term Vision

To pursue doctoral or advanced research training in biotechnology and contribute to scientific discoveries by integrating wet-lab expertise with computational and bioinformatics perspectives.
